title: Creepy Wolves
body:
Cats cant be tamed,
## BUT WOLVES CAN
# SO SAY GOODBYE TO RANDOM CREEPER ATTACKS
This mod allows wolves to scare Creepers just like cats, so you never have to worry about getting attacked by a creeper again, aslong as you have a four legged friend on your side.

### for modpacks
Feel free to include this mod in your modpack, aslong it is only available on Modrinth.
